tools.Name: Heretic
tools.Description: A tool that performs fully automatic censorship removal (abliteration) from transformer-based language models without expensive post-training.
tools.Use_Case: Decensoring language models while preserving intelligence, suitable for users with minimal technical expertise.

tools.Name: NeMo Gym
tools.Description: A library for building and scaling reinforcement learning training environments specifically for Large Language Models (LLMs).
tools.Use_Case: Creating training environments to improve agentic capabilities, reasoning, and instruction-following for LLMs.

tools.Name: Hindsight
tools.Description: An agent memory system that enables AI agents to learn from experience rather than just recalling conversation history.
tools.Use_Case: Enhancing agent accuracy in long-term memory tasks by organizing information into world facts, experiences, and learned mental models.
